nasb.text: Thus the sons of Israel did not remember the Lord their God, who had delivered them from the hands of all their enemies on every side;

esv.text: And the people of Israel did not remember the Lord their God, who had delivered them from the hand of all their enemies on every side,

cnv.text: 以色列人忘記了耶和華他們的　神，就是曾經拯救他們脫離四圍仇敵之手的那位；

ccb.text: 忘记了他们的上帝耶和华曾经从四围的仇敌手中拯救他们，
